title: One-Click Tree
body:
# Super611 + One-Click Tree

Cut down full trees with one action for Fabric 1.21.11.

## Features
- One-click connected log breaking
- Sneak-to-activate option
- Configurable range and block limits
- Optional natural-tree validation
- Optional auto-replant support

## Compatibility
- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric + Fabric API
